3142550.name: The Backrooms: Lost Tape Soundtrack
3142550.description:
The Official Soundtrack of The Backrooms: Lost Tape


Experience the atmospheric and contemplative soundtracks from The Backrooms: Lost Tape, composed by the talented Jovani Silveira, Zerofuturism, and Soundvision. This collection of music enhances the eerie and immersive atmosphere of the game, drawing you deeper into the mysterious world of the Backrooms.
